## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- The underlying need, not the proposed solution. "I'm doing X and Y
gets in my way" beats "add a Z button". -->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Your proposed solution. Mockups / sketches welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about and why they don't fit. -->

## Scope

<!-- Is this a small tweak (a new shortcut, a label change) or a larger
addition (multi-layer support, side-by-side compare mode)? Note: anything
that materially changes the single-overlay model was deliberately scoped
out of v0.1.0 — see SPRINT_PLAN.md S5 — but is worth discussing. -->
